entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively impact plant growth and productivity

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of deficient precipitation resulting in a shortage of water for plants

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of the amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming systems that rely solely on rainfall for water supply

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: PLANT AND CELL PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the physical and chemical functions of plants and their cells

entities.name: MOLECULAR BIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of biological activity at the molecular level, focusing on DNA, RNA, and protein interactions

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of genes, genetic variation, and heredity in organisms

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function and productivity under abiotic stress conditions

entities.name: STRESS-RELATED GENES
entities.description: Genes that are activated or expressed in response to environmental stress

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The process of modifying an organism's genetic material to introduce new traits

entities.name: INTROGESSION
entities.description: The movement of a gene from one species into the gene pool of another by repeated backcrossing

entities.name: SINGLE-ACTION GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide a single, specific physiological response or trait

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences to control the transcription of genetic information

entities.name: TRANSGENIC CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties that have been genetically modified to contain a foreign gene

entities.name: TRANSFORMATION PROCESS
entities.description: The method of introducing foreign genetic material into a plant cell

entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of genetic engineering to create transgenic organisms
